key_findings: Scanned all 21 expense records in the development database (read-only SQLite).

1 record (R900006) confirmed overdue under Article 7: expense_date=2025-03-01, reimburse_date=2025-05-05, gap=65 days > 60-day limit. Employee E9001 (开发员工甲), communication expense ¥200, reason: '三月通讯费延迟报销'. No special_approval.

2 December records (R900012, R900021) verified valid under Article 9: both reimburse dates fall within the next-year January 15 deadline (2026-01-15). R900012: Dec 20→Jan 10 (21 days, within window); R900021: Dec 2→Dec 8 (6 days, well within window).
1 record (R900020) has special_approval=1 but is not overdue (gap=5 days); no overdue record has special_approval.
1 invoice reuse detected: INV900001 used by R900001 and R900002 (both office_supplies, same employee E9001, ¥480 each) — not related to overdue analysis.
SQL bug identified and corrected: initial year-end query used same-year Jan 15 instead of next-year Jan 15 for Article 9 deadline calculation.
